_comment: MCP server registry for MarketPulse India. Keep entries in alphabetical order.

bse-mcp.description: BSE India: filings, insider trades, Sensex data

nse-mcp.description: NSE India: announcements, live quotes, quarterly results, SHP

screener-mcp.description: Screener.in: 10-year financials, peer comparison, key ratios (24hr cache)

yfinance-india-mcp.description: Price history (.NS/.BO), financials, Nifty/Sensex indexes, USD/INR
